jd_text:
This role will oversee financial strategy, governance, budgeting, and performance management, while supporting business expansion and operational excellence. 
 Develop and execute financial strategies that support business expansion and operational efficiency
  Lead annual budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes
  Monitor financial performance and deliver actionable insights to executive leadership
  Ensure robust financial governance, compliance, and risk management practices
  Partner with cross-functional teams to optimize costs and improve profitability
  Provide strategic financial analysis to support key business decisions and initiatives
  Drive continuous improvement in financial reporting and performance management systems
 


Requirements

The ideal candidate brings strong leadership experience within food or FMCG manufacturing, with a proven track record in driving profitability, optimizing costs, and partnering with executive teams to deliver sustainable growth. 
 Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field; CPA or CFA preferred
  3+ years of progressive financial leadership experience in food or FMCG manufacturing
  Proven track record in driving profitability, cost optimization, and financial performance
  Strong expertise in budgeting, forecasting, financial modeling, and performance reporting
  Demonstrated ability to partner effectively with executive teams and influence strategic outcomes
  Advanced proficiency in financial systems and data analytics tools
  Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills
  Experience supporting business growth initiatives and operational transformation projects
